headline: Assessing Eversource Energy (ES) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Return Profile
summary: Eversource Energy (ES) is drawing investor attention after recent trading left the stock around $66.82, with a mixed return profile across the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Eversource Energy. The recent 1 day share price decline of 2.47% to $66.82 follows a softer 7 day share price return and a weaker 90 day share price return of 6.39%. At the same time, the 1 year total shareholder return of 20.44% contrasts with negative total shareholder returns over three...
